description_long: This house is situated within a walled lot, surrounded by lush landscaping and numerous pink-blossomed trees, creating a tranquil residential setting. The structure itself is modern, with clean lines, a flat roof, and a combination of large windows and solid wall sections. The property features a paved driveway leading to the main entrance, which is accentuated by a small porch and steps. The perimeter walls are decorated with painted murals depicting urban scenery, enhancing the sense of depth and context. The house appears to be a single-story building with a spacious yard and garden areas, providing ample outdoor space. The overall design emphasizes openness, natural light, and integration with the surrounding greenery.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard enclosed by mural-decorated walls and pink-blossomed trees.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, porch, and a clear view of the landscaped yard with pink-blossomed trees and mural-decorated walls.
description_view_1: Side view highlights the driveway, additional garden space, and the continuation of the mural along the perimeter wall.
description_view_2: Rear view reveals the flat roof, more of the garden area, and the back section of the house with additional windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focuses on the driveway, side yard, and the mural-decorated wall with visible pink-blossomed trees.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with a small porch, steps, and a modern door, framed by landscaping and a paved approach.
